title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Light Theme
scenario: Color Theme switching does not apply immediately across all app screens when toggling between Follow Phone Theme, Light Theme, and Dark Theme in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on a phone set to Light Mode.
3. Tap the Account icon or menu to access Settings.
4. Navigate to Account → Settings → Color Theme.
5. Verify the current theme is set to 'Follow Phone Theme' (default).
7. Observe the Home screen and verify dark mode is applied immediately.
8. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify dark mode is applied.
9. Navigate to DFU screens (if accessible), Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, and Onboarding screens, verifying dark mode is applied on each.
10. Force close the app and reopen it.
11. Go to Account → Settings → Color Theme and verify 'Dark Theme' is still selected and dark mode persists across all screens.
13. Observe all app screens and verify light mode is applied immediately everywhere.
14. Force close the app and reopen it.
15. Verify 'Light Theme' is still selected and light mode persists.
17. Observe all app screens and verify the app reverts to the phone's light theme (Light Mode).
18. Tap the currently selected theme (e.g., 'Follow Phone Theme') again.
19. Verify no change occurs and the app remains on the same theme.
expected: The selected theme (Follow Phone Theme, Light Theme, or Dark Theme) is applied immediately across all app screens (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboardings) and persists after app restart. Tapping the currently selected theme does nothing.
